categories.label: Vitamins & Minerals
categories.description: The supplements worth spending money on. Every pick chosen for bioavailability, third-party testing, and ingredient form — not price or marketing.

categories.label: Skin & Body Care
categories.description: Anything that goes on your skin goes into your liver. My grandmother knew this. She made cerasee soap and bathed babies in it. This section honors that knowledge — clean ingredients, ancestral wisdom, no greenwashing.

categories.label: Baby & Family
categories.description: Natural baby and family care products. The same philosophy as everything else — what goes on their skin matters as much as what they eat.

categories.label: Caribbean Herbs
categories.description: Authentic Caribbean herbal sources — cerasee, soursop, bissy, moringa, fever grass. Hard to find, worth sourcing properly.

categories.label: Ayurvedic
categories.description: Herbs and preparations from the Indian Ayurvedic tradition. Tulsi, neem, ashwagandha, triphala — sourced to the standard these ancient preparations deserve.

categories.label: Kitchen & Brew Tools
categories.description: The tools that make a ritual feel like a ritual. Strainers, kettles, storage, brewing vessels. Chosen for quality and longevity.

products.name: Magnesium Glycinate
products.subtitle: The form that actually reaches your cells
products.whyThisNutrient: Magnesium is involved in over 300 enzymatic reactions in the body. Most adults are deficient and don't know it — because standard blood tests measure serum magnesium, which stays normal until you're severely depleted. The real deficit is intracellular. Low magnesium directly impairs sleep quality, increases cortisol, causes muscle tension, and worsens anxiety.
products.whyThisBrand: Thorne uses bisglycinate chelate — magnesium bonded to two glycine molecules, not oxide dust. Independent testing in 2025 found that many brands selling 'magnesium glycinate' actually contained magnesium oxide mixed with loose glycine powder. Thorne's manufacturing is NSF Certified for Sport, one of the highest third-party standards in the industry.
products.whyNotCheap: Magnesium oxide — the form in most drugstore bottles — has roughly 4% bioavailability. You're paying for something your body can't use. The glycinate form costs more and is worth every cent.
products.personalNote: This is the first thing I recommend to anyone who tells me they can't sleep or feel constantly wired. Most people notice a difference within a week.
products.caution: May cause loose stools at high doses. Start at 200mg.
products.teaNote: Magnesium activates the same calm pathways your valerian and passionflower blends target. Together they work from two directions — the herb calms the nervous system signal, magnesium provides the cellular fuel to sustain it.

products.name: Vitamin D3 + K2
products.subtitle: D3 opens the door. K2 tells calcium where to go.
products.dose: 5,000 IU D3 + 180mcg K2 daily with a fat-containing meal
products.whyThisNutrient: An estimated 42% of Americans are vitamin D deficient. D3 is essential for calcium absorption, immune regulation, testosterone production, and mood. But taking D3 alone without K2 can lead to calcium being deposited in soft tissue and arteries instead of bones. K2 (MK-7 form) activates the proteins that direct calcium correctly. They are meant to be taken together.
products.whyThisBrand: Pure Encapsulations is a hypoallergenic practitioner-grade brand. Their D3+K2 pairs 5,000 IU of D3 with 180mcg of MK-7 — the long-chain K2 form with the most clinical evidence. No artificial fillers, no common allergens, non-GMO verified.
products.whyNotCheap: Most cheap D3 supplements use D2 which raises blood levels less effectively. And K1 — found in many combo products — does not perform the same cardiovascular function as K2 MK-7. The form of each nutrient is everything.
products.personalNote: I take this every single morning with breakfast. Most people in Florida still test deficient — sun exposure alone isn't enough if you're indoors during peak hours.
products.caution: K2 may interact with blood thinners (warfarin/Coumadin). Consult your doctor.
products.teaNote: Your hawthorn and hibiscus blends support cardiovascular elasticity. D3+K2 works upstream — directing calcium into bone instead of artery walls.

products.name: Omega-3 Fish Oil
products.subtitle: Triglyceride form. The rest is biology.
products.dose: 2 soft gels daily with a meal
products.thirdParty: Third-party tested, USP verified, Friend of the Sea certified
products.whyThisNutrient: Omega-3s reduce systemic inflammation, support heart rhythm, lower triglycerides, protect the brain, support eye health, and improve mood. Most Western diets are severely omega-6 dominant. Fish oil rebalances that ratio.
products.whyThisBrand: Nordic Naturals uses re-esterified triglyceride form — the same molecular structure found in fish flesh — which absorbs 70% better than the ethyl ester form found in most supplements. Every batch is third-party tested.
products.whyNotCheap: Most cheap fish oil is in ethyl ester form — a semi-synthetic structure your body doesn't recognize as efficiently. It also oxidizes faster, which means rancid fish oil that may cause more harm than good. If your fish oil burps taste fishy, the oil is oxidized.
products.personalNote: This is the only fish oil where I never had that fishy aftertaste. That alone tells you the oil is fresh and properly processed.
products.caution: May thin blood at high doses. Consult doctor if on blood thinners.
products.teaNote: DHA in fish oil is the primary structural fat in the brain. Your lion's mane and ginkgo blends support neural growth factors — omega-3 gives them the raw material to work with.

products.name: Ashwagandha KSM-66
products.subtitle: 600mg root extract. 5% withanolides. The clinical standard.
products.form: KSM-66 root extract, standardized to 5%+ withanolides
products.whyThisNutrient: Over 30 human clinical trials show ashwagandha reduces cortisol levels, improves stress resilience, supports testosterone in men under chronic stress, improves sleep quality, and enhances VO2 max. The keyword is KSM-66 — that's the branded extract used in those trials.
products.whyThisBrand: Transparent Labs uses KSM-66 — made exclusively from the root, standardized to 5%+ withanolides. Generic ashwagandha typically contains 0.5–2% withanolides. Fully third-party tested with published certificates of analysis.
products.whyNotCheap: Generic ashwagandha root powder is inexpensive and largely ineffective at standard doses because the withanolide concentration is too low.
products.personalNote: This is the supplement I credit most with helping me stay even during high-stress periods. Takes 3–4 weeks of consistent use to feel the full effect.
products.caution: May interact with thyroid medications and sedatives. Not for use during pregnancy.
products.teaNote: When you drink your Stress Armour blend, the rhodiola and holy basil work on the HPA axis from the outside. KSM-66 ashwagandha works on the same cortisol-testosterone axis from the inside.

products.name: Collagen Peptides
products.subtitle: Hydrolyzed. Grass-fed. Vitamin C required.
products.form: Hydrolyzed Type I & III bovine collagen peptides
products.dose: 10–20g daily — mix into any warm liquid including your teas
products.whyThisNutrient: Collagen is the structural matrix of skin, tendons, ligaments, cartilage, and bone. After 25, your body produces roughly 1% less collagen per year. Weak tendons, achy joints, slow recovery — these are collagen problems before they're anything else.
products.whyThisBrand: Vital Proteins uses grass-fed, pasture-raised bovine hide. Their peptides are hydrolyzed to under 5,000 daltons, small enough to be absorbed through the gut wall. NSF Certified. Dissolves completely in hot or cold liquid.
products.whyNotCheap: Gelatin is not the same as hydrolyzed collagen peptides. The word 'hydrolyzed' on the label matters.
products.personalNote: I add a scoop to my morning tea every day. You can't taste it, it dissolves completely, and my joints feel the difference when I go a week without it.
products.caution: Not suitable for vegans. Those with beef allergies should avoid.
products.teaNote: Collagen synthesis requires vitamin C as a cofactor. Your Turmeric Tonic blend contains natural anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce the chronic inflammation that breaks down collagen.

products.name: Probiotics DS-01
products.subtitle: 24 clinically studied strains. Nested capsule. Actually reaches your gut.
products.whyThisNutrient: The gut microbiome is the foundation of immune function, mood, inflammation, metabolic health, and hormonal balance. Antibiotics, stress, processed food, alcohol, and age all deplete it.
products.whyThisBrand: Seed uses a ViaCap nested capsule that survives stomach acid. Most probiotics are dead before they reach your gut. 24 strains, all with published human clinical evidence.
products.whyNotCheap: Cheap probiotics are mostly marketing. A 10-billion CFU count means nothing if the strains are dead or unable to survive stomach acid.
products.personalNote: I was skeptical about the price. Then I stopped for a month and noticed the difference immediately. Now it's non-negotiable.
products.caution: May cause temporary bloating in the first week as the microbiome adjusts.
products.teaNote: Your gut-healing tea blends soothe and repair the gut lining. Seed DS-01 repopulates the microbiome. One prepares the terrain, the other plants the seeds.

products.name: CoQ10 Ubiquinol
products.subtitle: The active form. Your mitochondria will notice.
products.whyThisNutrient: CoQ10 is essential for mitochondrial energy production. After 30, production declines. Statins — one of the most prescribed drugs in America — block the same pathway that produces CoQ10. Anyone on a statin should be taking ubiquinol.
products.whyThisBrand: Qunol uses ubiquinol — the pre-converted active form — suspended in a water and fat soluble format for dramatically better absorption.
products.whyNotCheap: Ubiquinone (cheap CoQ10) has poor bioavailability, particularly in older adults. Ubiquinol produces plasma levels 3–4x higher at the same dose.
products.personalNote: I started taking this when researching the men's heart blend. Three weeks in I noticed I was recovering from workouts noticeably faster.
products.caution: May enhance effects of blood pressure medications. Monitor if on antihypertensives.
products.teaNote: Hawthorn berry supports myocardial efficiency and vascular tone. CoQ10 provides the cellular energy currency the heart muscle runs on.

products.name: Zinc Bisglycinate
products.subtitle: The mineral the immune system, testosterone, and prostate run on.
products.whyThisNutrient: Zinc is essential for immune function, testosterone production, prostate health, wound healing, DNA repair. The prostate concentrates zinc at higher levels than any other organ.
products.whyThisBrand: Thorne's zinc uses bisglycinate chelation for superior absorption and gentler digestion. Zinc oxide and zinc sulfate have poor bioavailability and cause nausea.
products.whyNotCheap: Zinc oxide absorbs at roughly 10%. Zinc bisglycinate absorbs at 30–40%. You'd need 3–4x the dose of zinc oxide to match bisglycinate — and at those doses, zinc oxide causes significant GI distress.
products.personalNote: Zinc was the supplement I was most skeptical about until I read the prostate research. The fact that the prostate actively concentrates zinc tells you everything.
products.caution: Do not exceed 40mg/day long-term. High-dose zinc competes with copper absorption.
products.teaNote: The prostate concentrates zinc higher than any other organ. Your Prostate Shield blend provides herbal support — but herbal sources alone can't replace the mineral itself.

products.name: Vitamin B12 Methylcobalamin
products.subtitle: The active form. Your nerves use it immediately.
products.dose: 1,000mcg daily — dissolve under tongue for best absorption
products.whyThisNutrient: B12 deficiency is one of the most underdiagnosed conditions in adults. It causes fatigue, brain fog, nerve damage, and depression. Vegans, people over 50, metformin users, and anyone on long-term antacids are at high risk.
products.whyThisBrand: Thorne's B12 uses methylcobalamin — the neurologically active form your body uses immediately. Cyanocobalamin must be converted by the body, and people with MTHFR gene variants do this conversion poorly.
products.whyNotCheap: Cyanocobalamin is synthetic and cheap. Methylcobalamin is the form naturally found in food and used by the nervous system.
products.personalNote: I switched from cyanocobalamin to methylcobalamin two years ago. The difference in mental clarity was noticeable within two weeks.
products.caution: Generally extremely safe. No known toxicity at standard doses.
products.teaNote: B12 is the raw material for myelin — the insulation around every nerve fiber. Without adequate B12, none of your focus blend's pathways transmit signals efficiently.

products.name: Liposomal Vitamin C
products.subtitle: Standard C is mostly excreted. Liposomal delivery changes everything.
products.dose: 1 packet (1,000mg) daily — can increase to 2–3 during illness
products.whyThisNutrient: Vitamin C is a master antioxidant, immune modulator, collagen cofactor. Most people are getting enough to prevent scurvy — not enough to optimize.
products.whyThisBrand: LivOn Labs pioneered liposomal vitamin C. The phospholipid bubble bypasses gut absorption limits. Standard vitamin C above 200mg is mostly excreted. Used by integrative physicians for immune support.
products.whyNotCheap: Standard ascorbic acid tablets above 500mg produce mostly expensive urine. The dose your tissues actually receive is limited by gut transport capacity. Liposomal delivery circumvents this completely.
products.personalNote: This is what I reach for the moment I feel anything coming on. Three years in, I can count on one hand how many times I've been sick.
products.caution: High doses may cause loose stools. Start with 1 packet.
products.teaNote: Vitamin C is essential for collagen synthesis and a cofactor in your liver's detox pathways. Your liver cleanse teas mobilize toxins — vitamin C helps neutralize the free radicals generated in that process.
